note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left heel wound site, rates 4/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Stage 4 pressure ulcer Left heel measures 9.3 cm x 7.4 cm x 2.2 cm.
  Wound bed: 63% slough, 37% granulation tissue. Periwound: indurated.
  Drainage: heavy. Odor: none.
Assessment: Stage 4 pressure ulcer Left heel — not improving.
Plan: Nutritional consult ordered. Foam dressing change daily.

Pt seen for wound eval. Pressure Ulcer Left heel measures aprx 9.3 x 7.4cm, depth 2.2cm.
Min drainage serosanguineous. Heel wound also eval - L ankle 5.6x4.4, 1.1cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Thu.
